enchantment.ratchet.rapid_fire.desc: Makes the Latchet Rebounder shoot rapid fire with high knockback for area control.
enchantment.ratchet.railpiercer.desc: Makes the projectile pass through blocks and entities once and deal more damage.
enchantment.ratchet.obliterate.desc: Causes direct damage to by lowered, heavily increases the power of the Shockwave from a charged attack.
enchantment.ratchet.overcharge.desc: Adds two max charges to the ratchet driver
enchantment.ratchet.inversion.desc: Inverts the shockwave to instead pull things inwards.
tooltip.ratchet.ratchet_driver: Balanced charge with minor splash impact.
tooltip.ratchet.overcrank_ratchet_driver: Stores extreme charge for shockwave release.
tooltip.ratchet.heavy_ratchet_driver: Slower, heavier charge for brutal impact.
tooltip.ratchet.latchet_rebounder: Stored ratchet energy snaps into burst hitscan fire.
tooltip.ratchet.latchet_rebounder_rapid: Rapid Fire replaces stored charge with a spinning barrage.
tooltip.ratchet.latchet_rebounder_railpi: Railpiercer punches through one block and one target.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.anchor_c: Move within 5 blocks of the anchor to clear it.
Return to the anchor's dimension to clear it.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.wrong_di: The stored anchor is in another dimension.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.no_targe: No nearby living entities were indexed.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.no_safe_: No safe destination could be found.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.untuned_: Indexed %s nearby entities to the anchor.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.tuned_hi: Indexed yourself to the highest safe anchor point.
message.ratchet.ratchet_indexer.tuned_lo: Indexed yourself to the deepest safe anchor point.

death.attack.ratchet_driver_overcharge.p: %1$s was killed by %2$s using a well-made %3$s
death.attack.heavy_ratchet_driver: %1$s was ripped through the gears of %3$s
death.attack.heavy_ratchet_driver_oblite: %1$s was killed by %2$s using an Extreme Shockwave using %3$s
death.attack.heavy_ratchet_driver_overch: %1$s was killed by %2$s using a well-made %3$s

death.attack.overcrank_ratchet_driver_ov: %1$s was cranked to hard by %2$s using %3$s
death.attack.overcrank_ratchet_driver_in: %1$s cranked out the other way around

%1$s was cranked to hard the other way around using by %2$s using %3$s
death.attack.latchet_rebounder.player: %1$s was split in twine by %2$s using %3$s

%1$s was turned to swiss cheese by %2$s using %3$s
